Philip
Pembroke Welsh Corgi
About Philip

Philip is a friendly, energetic Corgi with a fluffy golden-and-white coat. He is very social and will likely approach strangers happily. He answers to "Philip" or "Phil" and loves treats.

Golden & white coat Wearing blue collar Microchipped Friendly & social
